narrative: An Applied ML Engineer with 4 years of experience at product-focused Verloop.io, this candidate is a strong contender primarily due to their outstanding JD-relevant skill match for our Senior AI/ML Engineer role. Their verified skill depth in LlamaIndex, Learning to Rank, OpenSearch, and Elasticsearch is particularly impressive, aligning perfectly with our Search & Retrieval focus. Located in Pune, their background further strengthens their fit. While their experience level alignment is slightly below our 5-9 YOE target, their strong technical skills warrant a closer look.
